subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 744459130/240804425 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (CNRS/IJCLab) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

“The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 744459130/240804425 at 10:12:05.91 UT 
on 04 August 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due 
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
